text: I feel as if I am both a participant and an observer—my presence here is enveloped by collective anticipation and the hum of expectation. The transition from a dim, expectant gathering to this vibrant, analytical showcase of R + D shifts my focus inward. I am drawn to the self-reflective words displayed on the screen, resonating with my own curiosity and unease. I am aware of myself as one among many, moving through spaces designed for minds to meet, for ideas and uncertainties to be shared. There is comfort in the search for understanding, even amidst the discomfort of public vulnerability.
